sources.name: CodexBar
adaptedSemantics: cumulative total and last-token delta selection
monotonic watermark containment for interleaved lineages
first session metadata owns rollout identity
embedded ancestor metadata identifies a copied prefix
farmingDifferences: Farming stores source checkpoints and hourly aggregates in SQLite instead of CodexBar cache files
Farming excludes pricing, model catalogs, quota network calls, and UI code
Farming reports mutually exclusive non-cached input and cached input fields
For a compact explicit fork with no copied prefix, Farming accepts a present last-token delta but never bills an unknown total-only baseline
